chapters.title: Hackathon Begins
chapters.content: At 8 PM, the hackathon officially started. Teams opened laptops, drank too much coffee, and began turning ideas into code.

chapters.title: The Bug Nobody Found
chapters.content: At 2 AM, Maya’s team still had one serious bug. Everything looked correct, but the system kept failing without explanation.

chapters.title: Sunrise Victory
chapters.content: Just before sunrise, they found the problem: one missing character in the code. Everyone laughed with relief as the project finally worked.
